descriptionHtml:
Bali 5.8 for sale 2025 | 4 Cabins Owner's Version | Tax Not Paid

NEW - Fully equipped

Cancelled order sold as new with guarantee Bali 5.8 for sale 2025 – a brand-new model thoughtfully specified to provide comfortable long-distance cruising and effortless living aboard. This 4-cabin, 4-head configuration is designed for owners seeking both space and flexibility, making her a practical choice for family adventures or sharing with friends.

Key Configuration:

(AUTOPILOT, SOLAR PANELS, GENERATOR, AC, WATERMAKER, UNDERWATER LIGHTS, DISHWASHER, WASHER DRYER, CODE 0...)

Excellence Pack Specifications - Bali 5.8 for sale 2025:

  • Freshwater purifying filter
  • Combined 120A charger – 24V/230V 5kVA inverter
  • Battery controller for monitoring
  • 634L American fridge-freezer with chilled water dispenser, ice maker, dedicated inverter 230V
  • Tender lifting system for ease of launch and retrieval
  • 24V – 2300W electric windlass with chain sized for Ø12mm
  • 2 additional gel batteries 12/24V – 130 Ah
  • Indirect lighting on rooftop
  • Courtesy lighting in forward cockpit and sugarscoops
  • Increase to 1,200L diesel tanks (additional 600L)
  • Increase to 1,260L water tanks (additional 600L)
  • Cockpit shower (hot & cold)
  • Port side saloon integrated bar
  • Fixed rooftop table
  • Pot holders for galley hob
  • Swim ladder with handrails and teak steps
  • Electric aft door with hydraulic assist
  • Electric rooftop winches for solent and mainsail
  • Cushions for helm seat, forward cockpit, aft bench, sugarscoops
  • Gas oven and hob in galley
  • 2 coats of antifouling with epoxy primer
  • 16” touch-screen interface for energy and equipment management
  • Raymarine electronics pack with dual plotters (7” multi-display and 12” at helm), autopilot, AIS, VHF with extra handset, and I70S
  • Name and port of registry on sugarscoops

Elegance Pack:

  • Upholstered headboards, surrounds, vanity unit tops in the hulls
  • Indirect bed lighting, designer wall lights, chrome reading lamps
  • Magazine racks, bathroom comfort accessories
  • Upholstered and hardwood trims in saloon, decorative cushions, reading light at chart table, flagstaff

Rigging and Sails:

  • Fully-battened square-topped mainsail (reinforced Dacron) with BALI lazybag, lazyjacks
  • 121m² Code 0 (triradial cut, anti-twist cable, hardware)
  • 2 electric aft bulwark winches for downwind sails

Mechanical & Safety Equipment:

  • Upgraded 2 x N4-140HP engines + 2x30KW
  • Lithium LifePo4 battery pack (5x200Ah, BMS/CBRO)
  • Folding three-bladed propellers
  • Generator (17.5-20kVA, sound-insulated, remote control)
  • Solar panel kit (4740W, flybridge + hardtop)
  • Chain counter remote at helm
  • Safety package for 10 people (liferaft, lifejackets/harnesses, lanyards, buoy, flares, compass, first aid, bucket)

Comfort Features:

  • Reversible air conditioning (108,000 BTU, hulls + nacelle)
  • Opening front window with ventilation lock
  • Watermaker (240L/h, 230V)
  • Electric freshwater WCs
  • Dishwasher (12 place setting)
  • 32-bottle wine cooler (digital thermostat)
  • 8kg washer-dryer (230V)

Interior Layout:

  • XL starboard forepeak (separated double, storage, reading lights, sockets, vanity, mirror, separate shower/WC, blackout/mosquito screens)
  • Pleated blinds (hull windows, aft and side doors)
  • Saloon club lounge (2 armchairs, lamp, footstool)

Exterior Fittings:

  • Rigid hardtop with glass panels, indirect LED
  • Rooftop table with refrigerator and sink
  • Plancha grill (gas installation)
  • Blue LED underwater lighting (4 sugarscoop spots)
  • Hydraulic aft platform (max 350 kg)

Electronics & Hifi:

  • Fusion radio with 6 speakers, Bluetooth (saloon, rooftop, forward cockpit)
  • 50” LED TV in saloon (lifting system, terrestrial FR antenna)

This Bali 5.8 for sale 2025, NEW and thoughtfully specified, represents a modern, comfortable multihull platform ready for her first owner to set sail. For more details, viewing, or to discuss your preferences, don't hesitate to contact us!
